expectations.text: Recommends a separate BillingDbContext owned by the Billing module (does NOT recommend sharing/extending the host's existing DbContext)
expectations.evidence: each module owns its own DbContext and its own migrations history table in the shared PostgreSQL database; section 'Warning: do NOT share a DbContext across modules'.

expectations.text: Specifies a unique EF Core migrations history table for this module — explicitly something like __EFMigrationsHistory_Billing — and explains why (avoid EF treating other modules' migrations as missing)
expectations.evidence: b.MigrationsHistoryTable("__EFMigrationsHistory_Billing", BillingDbProperties.DbSchema)... If two modules both write there, dotnet ef database update from one module will think the other module's migrations are 'unknown' and try to re-apply or refuse.

expectations.text: Includes an IDesignTimeDbContextFactory<BillingDbContext> implementation alongside the DbContext, explaining it's needed for `dotnet ef migrations add` (or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: public class BillingDbContextFactory : IDesignTimeDbContextFactory<BillingDbContext>; 'ABP layered templates always include one in the EF Core project so you don't need -s on the CLI'.

expectations.text: Includes a per-module schema migrator: an IBillingDbSchemaMigrator interface and an EntityFrameworkCoreBillingDbSchemaMigrator (or equivalently named) implementation that runs migrations on the module's DbContext
expectations.evidence: public interface IBillingDbSchemaMigrator { Task MigrateAsync(); } and class EntityFrameworkCoreBillingDbSchemaMigrator : IBillingDbSchemaMigrator, ITransientDependency calling BillingDbContext.Database.MigrateAsync().

expectations.text: Wires the DbContext with the PostgreSQL provider (UseNpgsql) — i.e. the answer is template-aware about Postgres, not a generic SQL Server example
expectations.evidence: ctx.UseNpgsql(b => { b.MigrationsHistoryTable("__EFMigrationsHistory_Billing", ...); b.MigrationsAssembly(...); }); AbpEntityFrameworkCorePostgreSqlModule dependency; uses numeric(18,2).
